'''gothabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabbitproof|rabbitproof]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-th-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabbitproof|rabbitproof]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gothabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gothabithi|gothabithi]] || [[word:gothabiji|gothabiji]] || [[word:gothabishi|gothabishi]] || [[word:gothabiki|gothabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gothabuthuthu|gothabuthuthu]] || [[word:gothabujuju|gothabujuju]] || [[word:gothabushushu|gothabushushu]] || [[word:gothabukuku|gothabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gothabuthu|gothabuthu]] || [[word:gothabuju|gothabuju]] || [[word:gothabushu|gothabushu]] || [[word:gothabuku|gothabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gothabufthuf|gothabufthuf]] || [[word:gothabufjuf|gothabufjuf]] || [[word:gothabufshuf|gothabufshuf]] || [[word:gothabufkuf|gothabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gothabethe|gothabethe]] || [[word:gothabeje|gothabeje]] || [[word:gothabeshe|gothabeshe]] || [[word:gothabeke|gothabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gothabothotho|gothabothotho]] || [[word:gothabojojo|gothabojojo]] || [[word:gothaboshosho|gothaboshosho]] || [[word:gothabokoko|gothabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gothabotho|gothabotho]] || [[word:gothabojo|gothabojo]] || [[word:gothabosho|gothabosho]] || [[word:gothaboko|gothaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gothabofthof|gothabofthof]] || [[word:gothabofjof|gothabofjof]] || [[word:gothabofshof|gothabofshof]] || [[word:gothabofkof|gothabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gothabïfthïf|gothabïfthïf]] || [[word:gothabïfjïf|gothabïfjïf]] || [[word:gothabïfshïf|gothabïfshïf]] || [[word:gothabïfkïf|gothabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gothabïfthïfthïf|gothabïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:gothabïfjïfjïf|gothabïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:gothabïfshïfshïf|gothabïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:gothabïfkïfkïf|gothabïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gothabïfthïf|gothabïfthïf]] || [[word:gothabïfjïf|gothabïfjïf]] || [[word:gothabïfshïf|gothabïfshïf]] || [[word:gothabïfkïf|gothabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gothabïfthïf|gothabïfthïf]] || [[word:gothabïfjïf|gothabïfjïf]] || [[word:gothabïfshïf|gothabïfshïf]] || [[word:gothabïfkïf|gothabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gothabæthæ|gothabæthæ]] || [[word:gothabæjæ|gothabæjæ]] || [[word:gothabæshæ|gothabæshæ]] || [[word:gothabækæ|gothabækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gothabathatha|gothabathatha]] || [[word:gothabajaja|gothabajaja]] || [[word:gothabashasha|gothabashasha]] || [[word:gothabakaka|gothabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gothabatha|gothabatha]] || [[word:gothabaja|gothabaja]] || [[word:gothabasha|gothabasha]] || [[word:gothabaka|gothabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gothabafthaf|gothabafthaf]] || [[word:gothabafjaf|gothabafjaf]] || [[word:gothabafshaf|gothabafshaf]] || [[word:gothabafkaf|gothabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:gothabasha|gothabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:gothabshësha|gothabshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothabrosha|gothabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothabmusha|gothabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothabyasha|gothabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogothabnkshësha|gogothabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogothabnkrosha|gogothabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogothabnkmusha|gogothabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogothabnkyasha|gogothabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:gothathabasha|gothathabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gothathabshësha|gothathabshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothathabrosha|gothathabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothathabmusha|gothathabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothathabyasha|gothathabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogothathabnkshësha|gogothathabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogothathabnkrosha|gogothathabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogothathabnkmusha|gogothathabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogothathabnkyasha|gogothathabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:gethæbasha|gethæbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gethæbshësha|gethæbshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gethæbrosha|gethæbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gethæbmusha|gethæbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gethæbyasha|gethæbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogethæbnkshësha|gogethæbnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogethæbnkrosha|gogethæbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogethæbnkmusha|gogethæbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogethæbnkyasha|gogethæbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:gothfabasha|gothfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:gothfabshësha|gothfabshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothfabrosha|gothfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gothfabmusha|gothfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:gothfabyasha|gothfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogothfabnkshësha|gogothfabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gogothfabnkrosha|gogothfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogothfabnkmusha|gogothfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gogothfabnkyasha|gogothfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
